title: Pydantic v2 schema generation error

Use spring.security.oauth2.resourceserver.jwt.jwk-set-uri as fallback

title: Spring Boot reactive web server startup failure
fixes: Ensure spring-boot-starter-webflux is on classpath (not spring-boot-starter-web)
Check for port conflicts with server.port property
Remove conflicting servlet dependencies from classpath

title: Hibernate entity identifier changed
fixes: Never modify the @Id field after entity is persisted
Use a surrogate key if natural key can change
Detach and create new entity if ID change is needed

title: Spring Boot test context fails to load DataSource
fixes: Use @DataJpaTest for JPA-only tests (auto-configures H2)
Add @AutoConfigureTestDatabase for test database config
Exclude DataSource auto-config: @SpringBootTest(properties='spring.autoconfigure.exclude=...')

title: Gradle deprecated features warning for future version
fixes: Run 'gradle --warning-mode all' to see all deprecation details
Update build scripts to use non-deprecated APIs
Upgrade plugins that use deprecated Gradle APIs

title: Spring request scope accessed outside HTTP request
fixes: Ensure request-scoped beans are only accessed within HTTP request lifecycle
Use ObjectFactory<T> or Provider<T> for lazy resolution
For async tasks, pass needed data as parameters instead of using request scope

regex: JpaSystemException.*could not serialize access due to concurrent update
title: PostgreSQL serialization failure in JPA
fixes: Implement retry logic for serialization failures
Use READ_COMMITTED isolation level if strict serializability isn't needed
Reduce transaction duration to minimize conflict window

title: Java 21 StructuredTaskScope subtask failure
fixes: Handle FailedException in the scope's join()
Use ShutdownOnFailure policy to fail fast on first error
Check individual subtask states after scope completion

title: Java 21 ScopedValue accessed when not bound
fixes: Ensure code runs within ScopedValue.where().run() block
Use ScopedValue.orElse(default) for optional access
Check isBound() before calling get()

title: Java module reflection access denied
fixes: Add --add-opens java.base/java.lang=ALL-UNNAMED to JVM args
Use official API instead of reflective access
Add opens directive in module-info.java if you own the module

title: Spring Data query returned multiple results expecting one
fixes: Add LIMIT 1 or use findFirst...() method naming
Add unique constraint if data should be unique
Use findAll...() and handle multiple results in service layer

title: JPA entity not found by ID
fixes: Use findById() which returns Optional instead of getOne()/getReferenceById()
Check entity exists before operations: repository.existsById()
Handle EntityNotFoundException with @ExceptionHandler

title: Maven multi-module parent SNAPSHOT not found
fixes: Run 'mvn install' from the parent project first
Use relative path in child pom: <relativePath>../pom.xml</relativePath>
Deploy parent SNAPSHOT to shared repository for CI builds

title: Spring MVC unsupported HTTP method
fixes: Check controller mapping matches the HTTP method (@GetMapping vs @PostMapping)
Verify CORS preflight isn't being misrouted
Add the method to @RequestMapping's method attribute

title: Spring application context not refreshed
fixes: Call context.refresh() after registering bean definitions
Use SpringApplication.run() which handles context lifecycle
Ensure @PostConstruct doesn't access beans before context is ready

title: Spring Security no authentication credentials found
fixes: Ensure SecurityContext is populated (authentication filter ran)
Check filter order - authentication must come before authorization
For tests, use @WithMockUser or SecurityContextHolder.setContext()

title: Hibernate JPQL property resolution failure
fixes: Check property name matches the Java field name (not column name)
Use the exact case of the field in the entity class
Verify the property exists on the entity being queried

title: Hibernate null ID assertion failure
fixes: Ensure @GeneratedValue strategy is configured correctly
Check that the database sequence/auto-increment is working
Don't set ID manually when using auto-generation strategy

title: JVM ZGC allocation stall
fixes: Increase heap size to give ZGC more room
Set -XX:SoftMaxHeapSize to a value below -Xmx
Reduce allocation rate in application code (object pooling, etc.)

title: JVM G1GC full GC from allocation failure
fixes: Increase heap size with -Xmx
Tune G1 with -XX:G1HeapRegionSize and -XX:InitiatingHeapOccupancyPercent
Profile to find memory leaks causing old generation fill-up

title: JVM class file format error
fixes: Rebuild the project from clean: mvn clean package
Check for corrupted JAR files in local repository
Ensure compiler version matches target JVM version

regex: UnsupportedClassVersionError.*class file version \d+.*this Java Runtime only recognizes
title: Java class compiled with newer version than runtime
fixes: Upgrade runtime JDK to match or exceed compilation target
Set --release flag in compiler to target older JVM version
Check JAVA_HOME points to correct JDK version

title: Spring Boot port already in use
fixes: Change server.port in application.properties
Kill the process using the port: lsof -i :8080 then kill
Use server.port=0 for random port assignment in tests

title: Spring Data derived query property not found
fixes: Ensure method name segments match entity property names exactly
Use @Query annotation for complex queries instead of method naming
Check nested property navigation uses correct casing: findByAddress_City

title: Hibernate inheritance mapping class mismatch
fixes: Check @Inheritance strategy and discriminator values
Ensure discriminator column has correct value for each subclass
Clear session cache if entity was loaded as wrong type previously

title: Spring Data unable to acquire database connection
fixes: Increase connection pool size: spring.datasource.hikari.maximum-pool-size
Check database server is running and accessible
Fix connection leaks - ensure @Transactional methods don't hold connections

title: Spring R2DBC reactive timeout
fixes: Increase statement timeout in R2DBC connection factory config
Optimize the slow query causing the timeout
Add .timeout(Duration) operator in the reactive chain

title: Java 21 record pattern accessor not found
fixes: Ensure record component names match the pattern variable names
Recompile the record class if components were recently changed
Use explicit accessor methods if deconstruction pattern fails

title: Jackson cannot deserialize - no default constructor
fixes: Add @JsonCreator on constructor or static factory method
Add @NoArgsConstructor (Lombok) or default constructor
For records, ensure Jackson has jackson-module-parameter-names

title: Spring Boot @MockBean injection failure
fixes: Ensure @MockBean field type matches the actual bean type
Use @SpyBean if you want to spy on real implementation
Check that the bean being mocked is actually in the application context

title: Database lock wait timeout in Spring Data
fixes: Reduce transaction scope to hold locks briefly
Use @Transactional(timeout=30) to set explicit timeout
Investigate and resolve the blocking transaction

title: Spring Retry all attempts exhausted
fixes: Increase maxAttempts in @Retryable annotation
Add @Recover method for graceful fallback
Check if the underlying issue is permanent (don't retry non-transient errors)

title: Maven enforcer plugin Java version check failed
fixes: Install the required Java version specified by the project
Update enforcer plugin rule to match your Java version
Set JAVA_HOME to the required version before building

title: Spring test context cache overflow
fixes: Reduce unique @MockBean combinations across tests
Share test configurations with @Import or @ContextConfiguration
Use @DirtiesContext sparingly - only when context truly needs reset

regex: hibernate\.type\.descriptor.*No Dialect mapping for JDBC type
title: Hibernate no dialect mapping for JDBC type
fixes: Register custom type with @TypeDef or AttributeConverter
Use @Column(columnDefinition=...) to specify exact SQL type
Upgrade Hibernate to get support for newer JDBC types

title: Spring Security method security on non-public method
fixes: Make the secured method public
Use AspectJ mode for non-public method security: @EnableMethodSecurity(mode=AdviceMode.ASPECTJ)
Apply security at the public-facing API layer instead

title: Project Reactor duplicate subscription error
fixes: Use .cache() or .share() for hot publishers subscribed multiple times
Ensure each subscriber gets its own subscription (cold publisher)
Check for accidental multiple subscribe calls in WebFlux chain

title: Blocking call in reactive context
fixes: Replace block() with subscribe() or chain with flatMap/then
Use Schedulers.boundedElastic() for wrapping blocking calls
Refactor blocking code to return Mono/Flux all the way through

title: Hibernate batch update affected 0 rows
fixes: Entity may have been deleted by another transaction
Check @Version field for stale optimistic lock version
Verify entity ID is correct and record exists in database

title: Spring Cloud Config Server property source not found
fixes: Verify config server is running and accessible
Check application name and profile match config repository structure
Set spring.config.import=optional:configserver: to make it non-fatal

title: NoSuchMethodError from Java version mismatch in dependencies
fixes: Align all dependencies to the same Java version target
Update the library that was compiled against a different version
Check BOM versioning for consistent dependency alignment

regex: HikariPool.*Connection is not available.*request timed out
title: HikariCP connection pool timeout
fixes: Increase spring.datasource.hikari.connection-timeout
Increase pool size: spring.datasource.hikari.maximum-pool-size
Check for connection leaks with leak-detection-threshold

title: Spring GraphQL query complexity limit exceeded
fixes: Simplify the client query (reduce nesting/fields)
Increase max complexity in GraphQL config if legitimate
Add pagination to collection fields to reduce per-query load

title: Spring Boot test REST call timeout
fixes: Increase timeout on TestRestTemplate with RequestConfig
Check test server is started - use @SpringBootTest(webEnvironment=RANDOM_PORT)
Ensure async operations complete before assertion

title: Spring Batch flat file parsing error
fixes: Check field delimiter and line format matches tokenizer configuration
Add fault tolerance: .faultTolerant().skip(FlatFileParseException.class)
Validate input file format before batch processing starts

title: Spring Cache annotation missing cache name
fixes: Specify cache name: @Cacheable('myCache')
Configure default cache in application.properties
Ensure @EnableCaching is present on a configuration class

title: Gradle compilation task failure
fixes: Check compiler error messages in build output
Ensure all dependencies are resolved: gradle dependencies
Clean build directory and retry: gradle clean build

title: Jakarta Bean Validation constraint declaration error
fixes: Don't add constraints on overriding methods (violates LSP)
Apply constraints only on interface or parent class methods
Use @Valid on the parameter and constraints on the type itself

title: Flyway migration checksum mismatch
fixes: Never modify already-applied migrations - create a new one
Use flyway repair to fix checksum in schema history table
Set flyway.validate-migration-naming=true to catch naming issues early

title: Java 21 virtual thread executor rejected task
fixes: Check if the executor has been shut down
Ensure no limit was set on the virtual thread executor
Verify system resources (file descriptors, memory) aren't exhausted

regex: Error: state snapshot was created by Terraform v.*, which is newer than current
title: Terraform state created by newer version
fixes: Upgrade Terraform CLI to match or exceed the version in state
Use tfenv to manage multiple Terraform versions
Never downgrade Terraform after state is written by newer version

regex: Error acquiring the state lock.*Lock Info.*ID:
title: Terraform state lock cannot be acquired
fixes: Run 'terraform force-unlock <LOCK_ID>' if previous run crashed
Check if another team member has a running terraform operation
Verify backend (S3/GCS) permissions allow lock operations

title: Terraform resource exists but not in state
fixes: Use 'terraform import <resource_address> <id>' to import existing resource
Use import blocks in Terraform 1.5+: import { to = ... id = ... }
Remove the resource from cloud manually if it should be recreated

regex: Error: Moved block.*does not match any resource
title: Terraform moved block target doesn't exist
fixes: Verify the 'to' address in moved block matches new resource address exactly
Run 'terraform plan' to see current state addresses
Remove moved block after state has been successfully migrated

title: Terraform dependency lock file inconsistent
fixes: Run 'terraform init -upgrade' to update the lock file
Delete .terraform.lock.hcl and run 'terraform init' to regenerate
Commit the lock file so all team members use same provider versions

regex: Error:.*Unsupported attribute.*This object has no argument.*attribute.*named
title: Terraform unsupported attribute reference
fixes: Check provider documentation for correct attribute names
Upgrade provider version that may have added the attribute
Use terraform console to inspect the available attributes

title: Terraform dependency cycle detected
fixes: Break the cycle by using depends_on explicitly on one side
Extract shared configuration into a separate module
Use data sources instead of direct references to break cycles

title: Pulumi resource already exists outside stack
fixes: Use pulumi import to bring existing resource under management
Set import option on the resource: { import: 'existing-id' }
Delete the external resource if Pulumi should create it fresh

regex: pulumi.*error:.*stack.*is being updated by another process
title: Pulumi stack locked by another update
fixes: Wait for the other operation to complete
Use 'pulumi cancel' to cancel the stuck operation
For cloud backend, the lock auto-expires after timeout

title: Pulumi secrets provider access denied
fixes: Verify KMS/Vault credentials are configured correctly
Check IAM permissions for the encryption key
Use 'pulumi stack change-secrets-provider' to switch providers

regex: ansible.*UNREACHABLE.*Failed to connect to the host via ssh
title: Ansible SSH connection failure
fixes: Verify SSH key is loaded: ssh-agent and ssh-add
Check ansible_host, ansible_user, ansible_ssh_private_key_file in inventory
Test connectivity manually: ssh -vvv user@host

title: Ansible permission denied during task
fixes: Add 'become: yes' and 'become_method: sudo' to the task/playbook
Ensure the ansible user has sudo privileges on the target
Check file ownership and permissions on target resources

title: Ansible sudo timeout
fixes: Configure NOPASSWD in sudoers for the ansible user
Set ansible_become_password in vault-encrypted variables
Increase timeout with ansible_timeout in ansible.cfg

regex: ansible.*module_stderr.*is not a valid attribute for
title: Ansible invalid module attribute
fixes: Check module documentation for correct parameter names
Update Ansible to a version that supports the attribute
Use ansible-doc <module> to see available parameters

regex: github actions.*Error: Process completed with exit code 1.*run:
title: GitHub Actions step failed with exit code 1
fixes: Add 'set -e' awareness and check individual command exit codes
Use 'continue-on-error: true' if failure is acceptable
Add error handling or debugging output before the failing command

title: GitHub Actions artifact not found for download
fixes: Ensure upload-artifact step ran successfully in the same workflow run
Match artifact name exactly between upload and download steps
For v4, artifacts are scoped to workflow run - can't download across runs by default

regex: github actions.*matrix.*exclude.*does not match any configuration
title: GitHub Actions matrix exclude doesn't match
fixes: Ensure exclude values exactly match the matrix combinations
Use include to add specific combinations instead of complex excludes
Check that excluded keys use same types (string vs number)

title: GitHub Actions reusable workflow not found
fixes: Use full path: owner/repo/.github/workflows/file.yml@ref
Ensure the workflow file exists on the referenced branch/tag
Check repository visibility - private repos need explicit access

title: GitHub Actions OIDC token retrieval failure
fixes: Add 'permissions: id-token: write' to the job
Verify the OIDC provider trust policy accepts the repo/branch
Check that the workflow is running on github.com (not GHES without OIDC)

title: ArgoCD application sync failure
fixes: Check ArgoCD UI for detailed sync error on each resource
Verify Git repository is accessible with configured credentials
Check for Kubernetes API errors in the sync status

title: ArgoCD sync hook failure
fixes: Check hook Job/Pod logs for error details
Ensure hook has correct annotation: argocd.argoproj.io/hook
Verify hook resource has appropriate RBAC permissions

title: ArgoCD deployment health degraded - deadline exceeded
fixes: Increase progressDeadlineSeconds in Deployment spec
Check Pod events for scheduling/pull/crash issues
Verify resource requests don't exceed cluster capacity

title: Helm chart template rendering error
fixes: Run 'helm template --debug' to see where rendering fails
Check for nil values - use 'default' function or 'if' guards
Verify values.yaml provides all required values for templates

title: Helm upgrade failed - operation in progress
fixes: Run 'helm rollback <release> <revision>' to fix pending state
Use 'helm history <release>' to find last successful revision
As last resort: kubectl delete secret -l status=pending-upgrade

regex: helm.*Error:.*rendered manifests contain a resource that already exists
title: Helm resource already exists (not managed by this release)
fixes: Add helm.sh/resource-policy: keep annotation if resource should be adopted
Use --force flag on upgrade to overwrite
Import existing resource with 'kubectl annotate' to set helm ownership

title: Prometheus scrape target timeout
fixes: Increase scrape_timeout in prometheus.yml job config
Check target endpoint is responding within timeout
Reduce the number of metrics exposed if endpoint is too slow

title: Prometheus Alertmanager webhook notification failure
fixes: Verify webhook URL is accessible from Alertmanager
Check webhook receiver endpoint returns 2xx status
Inspect Alertmanager logs for detailed error response

title: Grafana datasource proxy returning 502
fixes: Verify datasource URL is accessible from Grafana server
Check datasource authentication credentials
Increase timeout in datasource configuration

title: Elasticsearch index read-only due to disk watermark
fixes: Free disk space on Elasticsearch data nodes
Reset read-only flag: PUT /_settings {'index.blocks.read_only_allow_delete': null}
Adjust disk watermark: cluster.routing.allocation.disk.watermark.flood_stage

regex: logstash.*pipeline.*error.*could not index event to Elasticsearch
title: Logstash pipeline failed to index to Elasticsearch
fixes: Check Elasticsearch cluster health and disk space
Verify mapping conflicts (field type mismatch)
Add dead_letter_queue to handle failed events

title: HashiCorp Vault permission denied
fixes: Check Vault policy attached to the token/role allows the operation
Verify token hasn't expired: vault token lookup
Ensure the secret engine is mounted at the expected path

title: HashiCorp Vault seal/unseal error
fixes: Provide required number of unseal keys (quorum)
Check auto-unseal KMS key is accessible
Verify Vault storage backend is healthy and accessible

title: Istio service mesh no healthy upstream
fixes: Check destination pod health and readiness probes
Verify DestinationRule and VirtualService configuration
Check mTLS settings match between services (STRICT vs PERMISSIVE)

title: Istio authorization policy denied request
fixes: Review AuthorizationPolicy rules for the target service
Check source principal (service account) matches allow rules
Verify request headers/paths match policy conditions

title: Linkerd mTLS connection failure
fixes: Check proxy identity certificates haven't expired
Verify trust anchors are consistent across the mesh
Restart the affected pod to refresh proxy certificates

title: Load balancer target health check failure
fixes: Verify health check endpoint returns 200 status
Check health check path, port, and protocol match application config
Increase health check interval/threshold for slow-starting applications

regex: terraform.*Error:.*Provider produced inconsistent result after apply
title: Terraform provider inconsistent result after apply
fixes: This is usually a provider bug - report to provider maintainers
Try terraform apply again (may succeed on retry)
Use lifecycle { ignore_changes } for the inconsistent attribute as workaround

regex: terraform.*Error:.*for_each.*depends on resource attributes that cannot be determined
title: Terraform for_each with unknown value
fixes: Use -target to apply the dependency first, then full apply
Move the dynamic value to a local with a known set of keys
Use count with length() if the collection is from a data source

title: GitHub Actions annotations limit exceeded
fixes: Reduce the number of warning/error annotations per step
Batch similar annotations into a single summary
Use workflow commands to group and collapse annotations

title: ArgoCD destination cluster not found
fixes: Register the cluster: argocd cluster add <context>
Verify cluster URL matches exactly in application spec
Check cluster credentials haven't expired in ArgoCD secret

regex: helm.*Error:.*values don't meet the specifications.*schema validation
title: Helm values schema validation failure
fixes: Check values against the chart's values.schema.json
Ensure required values are provided in -f values.yaml or --set
Run 'helm lint' to validate chart and values locally

title: Prometheus TSDB compaction failure due to disk space
fixes: Free disk space or expand storage volume
Reduce retention: --storage.tsdb.retention.time and retention.size
Move TSDB to larger volume with --storage.tsdb.path

title: Kibana cannot connect to Elasticsearch
fixes: Verify Elasticsearch is running and healthy
Check elasticsearch.hosts in kibana.yml
Ensure network/firewall allows connection between Kibana and ES

title: Ansible Jinja2 undefined variable error
fixes: Define the variable in vars, group_vars, or host_vars
Use default filter: {{ my_var | default('fallback') }}
Check variable scope - block vars don't leak to other blocks

title: Terraform backend configuration changed
fixes: Run 'terraform init -reconfigure' to reinitialize backend
Use 'terraform init -migrate-state' to move state to new backend
Back up state file before changing backend configuration

title: Pulumi preview shows unexpected resource diff
fixes: Run 'pulumi refresh' to sync state with actual cloud resources
Check for drift caused by manual changes outside Pulumi
Use ignoreChanges option for externally-managed properties

title: GitHub Actions container action not supported on runner
fixes: Use a Linux runner for container actions (not Windows/macOS)
Switch to a JavaScript action alternative
Use a self-hosted runner with Docker installed

title: Istio circuit breaker activated
fixes: Check upstream service health and fix failing pods
Adjust outlierDetection settings in DestinationRule
Increase consecutiveErrors threshold if transient failures are expected

title: Vault dynamic secret lease expired
fixes: Implement lease renewal before expiry in application
Increase default_lease_ttl and max_lease_ttl on the secret engine
Use Vault Agent for automatic secret renewal

title: Load balancer SSL certificate expired
fixes: Renew the certificate and update the LB listener
Use cert-manager or ACM for automatic certificate renewal
Set up monitoring alerts for certificate expiry (30 days before)

title: Terraform provider not found in registry
fixes: Check provider source path: required_providers { name = { source = '...' } }
Run 'terraform init' to download the provider
For private providers, configure credentials in .terraformrc

title: Terraform count depends on unresolvable value
fixes: Use a data source or variable for count instead of computed attribute
Split into two applies: first create the dependency, then use count
Use for_each with a known set instead of count with computed value

title: Terraform tainted resource requires replacement
fixes: Run 'terraform apply' to replace the tainted resource
Use 'terraform untaint <resource>' to remove taint if not needed
In Terraform 1.5+, use 'terraform apply -replace=<resource>' instead of taint

title: Pulumi create fails - resource needs import
fixes: Add import: 'resource-id' to the resource options
Use 'pulumi import <type> <name> <id>' CLI command
Delete external resource first if fresh creation is intended

title: Ansible become method not available
fixes: Install the become method binary on the target (sudo, doas, etc.)
Change become_method to one available on target: ansible_become_method=su
Use 'raw' module to install sudo before running the playbook

title: Ansible Jinja2 filter not found
fixes: Install required Ansible collection providing the filter
Check filter name spelling and required imports
Use ansible-galaxy collection install for community filters

regex: github actions.*Error: Input required and not supplied.*input
title: GitHub Actions required input not supplied
fixes: Pass required inputs in workflow_call trigger or action 'with' block
Add default values in the action/workflow input definition
Check input names match between caller and callee (case-sensitive)

regex: github actions.*Error:.*resource not accessible by integration
title: GitHub Actions token lacks required permission
fixes: Add required permissions to the workflow: permissions: { issues: write }
Use a PAT or GitHub App token for cross-repo operations
Check organization policy allows the required permission

title: ArgoCD sync failed - target namespace doesn't exist
fixes: Create namespace manually or add it to the Application manifests
Set CreateNamespace=true in sync options
Use a PreSync hook to create the namespace before resources

title: ArgoCD GPG signature verification failure
fixes: Add the signing key to ArgoCD GPG keys config
Disable GPG verification if not required: --insecure in repo config
Re-sign commits with a key trusted by ArgoCD

title: Helm chart uses deprecated/removed Kubernetes API
fixes: Update chart templates to use current API versions (e.g., apps/v1)
Use 'helm mapkubeapis' plugin to fix old releases
Upgrade the chart to a version compatible with your K8s version

title: Prometheus rule evaluation exceeding interval
fixes: Optimize PromQL queries in the slow rule group
Increase evaluation_interval for expensive rule groups
Split large rule groups into smaller ones

title: Grafana panel query timeout
fixes: Optimize the PromQL/SQL query for the panel
Increase query timeout in datasource settings
Reduce time range or add recording rules for expensive queries

title: Elasticsearch field mapping parse failure
fixes: Check field value type matches the mapping type
Use dynamic templates to handle varying field types
Create explicit mapping before indexing or use ignore_malformed

title: Logstash Grok pattern match failure
fixes: Test pattern with Grok Debugger tool
Add tag_on_failure and handle non-matching events
Use multiple grok patterns with break_on_match for varying formats

title: Vault token has been revoked
fixes: Generate a new token with vault token create
Check if parent token was revoked (cascading revocation)
Use periodic tokens to avoid TTL-based revocation

title: Istio sidecar injection webhook failure
fixes: Check istiod is running and healthy
Verify webhook certificate hasn't expired
Label namespace with istio-injection=enabled

title: Linkerd identity certificate expired
fixes: Rotate trust anchor and issuer certificates
Use 'linkerd check --proxy' to diagnose certificate issues
Set up cert-manager for automatic Linkerd certificate rotation

title: Load balancer backend connection timeout despite healthy
fixes: Increase backend timeout settings (separate from health check)
Check application isn't overloaded (request timeout vs health check)
Verify the request path timeout matches application response time

title: Terraform cannot destroy resource with deletion protection
fixes: Disable deletion protection first: set lifecycle_rule or API flag
Update the resource to disable protection, apply, then destroy
Use lifecycle { prevent_destroy = false } in terraform config

title: Ansible loop variable undefined
fixes: Check 'loop' or 'with_items' variable is defined and not empty
Use 'when: my_list is defined and my_list | length > 0'
Verify variable scope - registered vars don't cross play boundaries

title: GitHub Actions cache size limit exceeded
fixes: Reduce cache paths to only essential directories
Use more specific cache keys to avoid bloated caches
Split cache into multiple smaller caches with different keys

title: ArgoCD too many resources for diff computation
fixes: Split application into multiple smaller ArgoCD Applications
Use ApplicationSet for managing many similar resources
Increase resource tracking limit in ArgoCD configmap

title: Helm lookup function not available in template mode
fixes: lookup only works during install/upgrade, not 'helm template'
Provide values via --set or values.yaml instead of cluster lookup
Use conditional: {{ if .Release.IsInstall }} with lookup

title: Prometheus WAL (Write-Ahead Log) corruption
fixes: Delete corrupted WAL segments and restart Prometheus
Use promtool tsdb recover-wal to attempt recovery
Restore from backup if WAL is unrecoverable

title: Grafana provisioning invalid datasource type
fixes: Check datasource type matches an installed plugin
Install the required datasource plugin before provisioning
Verify type field in provisioning YAML matches plugin ID exactly

title: Elasticsearch circuit breaker tripped (data too large)
fixes: Reduce query complexity or aggregation cardinality
Increase indices.breaker.total.limit (risky - may cause OOM)
Add more nodes to distribute memory load

title: Vault storage backend initialization error
fixes: Verify storage backend (Consul/Raft/S3) is accessible
Check storage configuration in vault.hcl
Ensure storage path exists and has correct permissions

title: Istio VirtualService destination host not found
fixes: Ensure destination host matches a Kubernetes Service name
Use FQDN: service-name.namespace.svc.cluster.local
Check ServiceEntry if routing to external service

title: Terraform each.key used without for_each
fixes: Add for_each argument to the resource or module block
Replace each.key with count.index if using count
Ensure for_each is a map or set, not a list

title: Pulumi targeted update requires resource replacement
fixes: Include dependent resources in --target list
Run without --target to allow full dependency resolution
Use pulumi preview to check replacement scope before apply

title: Ansible dict attribute access error
fixes: Use bracket notation: my_dict['key'] instead of my_dict.key
Check dict structure with debug: msg={{ my_dict | to_nice_json }}
Use default filter: my_dict.key | default('fallback')

title: GitHub Actions workflow YAML syntax error
fixes: Validate YAML with a linter (yamllint, VS Code YAML extension)
Check for indentation issues and special character escaping
Ensure multiline strings use correct YAML notation (|, >)

title: ArgoCD git repository authentication failure
fixes: Update repository credentials in ArgoCD settings
Use SSH key or deploy token for private repositories
Check credential secret hasn't expired or been rotated

title: Helm CRD owned by another release
fixes: CRDs should be installed separately from the chart
Use --skip-crds flag if CRDs are managed externally
Transfer CRD ownership with kubectl annotate

title: Prometheus remote write queue full - samples dropped
fixes: Increase queue_config capacity and max_shards
Check remote storage endpoint throughput
Reduce scrape frequency or number of targets if overloaded

title: Elasticsearch index not found
fixes: Check index name and ensure it exists: GET _cat/indices
Use index alias that auto-creates with ILM rollover policy
Create the index with proper mappings before writing

title: Logstash pipeline terminated unexpectedly
fixes: Check Logstash logs for underlying error causing shutdown
Increase JVM heap for Logstash: -Xms1g -Xmx1g in jvm.options
Check for plugin compatibility issues with Logstash version

title: Vault AppRole SecretID not found or expired
fixes: Generate new SecretID: vault write auth/approle/role/<name>/secret-id
Check secret_id_ttl hasn't expired
Use response wrapping for SecretID delivery in CI/CD

title: Istio gateway port already bound
fixes: Check for duplicate Gateway resources binding same port
Use different ports for different gateways
Merge gateway configurations into a single Gateway resource

title: Linkerd service discovery lookup failure
fixes: Ensure destination service is running and has endpoints
Check ServiceProfile resources for correct service FQDN
Verify Linkerd destination controller is healthy

title: Load balancer surge queue full causing 5xx
fixes: Increase backend capacity (scale up/out)
Increase surge queue length if supported by LB type
Implement connection draining and request queuing at application level

title: Terraform import into occupied state address
fixes: Remove existing resource from state: terraform state rm <address>
Use a different resource address for the import
Check if the resource is already managed under a different name

title: Ansible package not found in repositories
fixes: Enable the required repository on the target system
Check package name matches the target OS package manager naming
Use 'update_cache: yes' to refresh package lists before install

title: GitHub Actions workflow cancelled by concurrency group
fixes: Remove cancel-in-progress if concurrent runs should queue
Use unique concurrency group keys per branch/PR
Add retry logic for workflows that might be cancelled

title: ArgoCD sync waiting for CRD to be ready
fixes: Apply CRDs first using sync waves: argocd.argoproj.io/sync-wave: '-1'
Use ServerSideApply sync option for CRD resources
Ensure CRD controller is deployed and running before dependent resources

title: Helm YAML parse error from tabs
fixes: Replace all tabs with spaces in YAML templates
Configure editor to insert spaces for indentation
Use 'helm lint --strict' to catch formatting issues early

title: Grafana alert stuck in NoData state
fixes: Verify datasource is returning data for the alert query
Configure 'No Data' handling: set to Alerting or OK
Check query time range and evaluation interval alignment

title: Vault requested TTL exceeds max_ttl
fixes: Increase max_ttl on the auth method or secrets engine mount
Request a TTL within the allowed max_ttl limit
Set system max_lease_ttl higher via vault write sys/mounts/...

title: Terraform S3 backend bucket doesn't exist
fixes: Create the S3 bucket manually before terraform init
Check bucket name and region match backend configuration
Verify AWS credentials have s3:GetBucketLocation permission

regex: ERROR:.*cannot extract elements from a scalar.*jsonb
title: PostgreSQL JSONB extracting from scalar
fixes: Check value is an object/array before extraction: jsonb_typeof(col) = 'object'
Use COALESCE with '{}' for null/scalar values
Validate JSON structure before querying nested paths

title: PostgreSQL JSONB operator type mismatch
fixes: Cast the right operand to jsonb: col @> '{"key": "val"}'::jsonb
Use ->> operator for text extraction instead of ->
Ensure both sides of containment operator are jsonb type

title: PostgreSQL full-text search config not found
fixes: Create the text search configuration or use a built-in one (english, simple)
Install the pg_catalog extension if using a custom configuration
Check search_path includes schema where ts_config is defined

title: PostgreSQL partition range overlap
fixes: Ensure partition bounds don't overlap with existing partitions
Use FROM (value) TO (value) with non-overlapping ranges
Check existing partitions: SELECT * FROM pg_partitions

regex: ERROR:.*no partition of relation.*found for row
title: PostgreSQL no matching partition for inserted row
fixes: Create a partition covering the value range being inserted
Add a DEFAULT partition to catch unmatched rows
Verify partition key value falls within defined ranges

title: PostgreSQL logical replication slot not found
fixes: Create replication slot: SELECT pg_create_logical_replication_slot('name', 'pgoutput')
Check slot wasn't dropped: SELECT * FROM pg_replication_slots
Recreate subscription with CREATE SUBSCRIPTION ... SLOT NAME 'name'

title: PostgreSQL replication slot already active
fixes: Terminate the existing connection using the slot
Wait for the current consumer to disconnect
Use pg_terminate_backend() on the PID occupying the slot

regex: ERROR:.*new row violates row-level security policy
title: PostgreSQL row-level security policy violation
fixes: Check RLS policy conditions match the current user's context
Verify SET SESSION current_user or app.current_tenant is set
Review policies with SELECT * FROM pg_policies WHERE tablename = '...'

regex: ERROR:.*infinite recursion detected in policy for relation
title: PostgreSQL RLS infinite recursion
fixes: Use SECURITY DEFINER function to break the policy recursion
Add USING clause that doesn't reference the same table's RLS
Mark the helper function as NOT LEAKPROOF and use different role

title: PostgreSQL deadlock detected
fixes: Ensure transactions acquire locks in consistent order
Keep transactions short to minimize deadlock window
Add retry logic for deadlock errors in application code

regex: ERROR:.*could not serialize access due to read/write dependencies
title: PostgreSQL serialization failure
fixes: Implement retry logic for serialization failures (40001)
Reduce transaction isolation level if strict serializability isn't required
Minimize the work done within serializable transactions

regex: ERROR:.*canceling statement due to statement timeout
title: PostgreSQL statement timeout exceeded
fixes: Optimize the slow query (add indexes, rewrite)
Increase statement_timeout for specific session: SET statement_timeout = '60s'
Use EXPLAIN ANALYZE to identify query bottleneck

title: MySQL recursive CTE exceeded execution time
fixes: Add a recursion depth limit with a counter column
Set cte_max_recursion_depth to appropriate value
Optimize the recursive query or use iterative approach

title: MySQL window function frame specification error
fixes: Remove frame clause for functions that don't support it (ROW_NUMBER, RANK)
Use ROWS/RANGE BETWEEN correctly for aggregate window functions
Check MySQL version supports the specific frame type used

title: MySQL JSON_TABLE invalid JSON argument
fixes: Validate JSON column data: JSON_VALID(column)
Handle NULL values: IFNULL(json_col, '[]')
Cast the input to JSON type if stored as TEXT

title: MySQL cannot make primary key invisible
fixes: Primary keys cannot be invisible - use a different index
Create a secondary unique index and make it invisible for testing
Use ALTER TABLE ... ALTER INDEX idx_name INVISIBLE for non-PK indexes

title: MySQL clone plugin version mismatch
fixes: Ensure donor and recipient have same MySQL version (major.minor.patch)
Upgrade recipient to match donor version
Use mysqldump/mysqlsh for cross-version data transfer instead

title: MongoDB duplicate key error on _id
fixes: Let MongoDB auto-generate _id instead of specifying manually
Use updateOne with upsert:true for insert-or-update patterns
Check for race conditions causing duplicate _id generation

title: MongoDB aggregation exceeded memory limit
fixes: Add {allowDiskUse: true} to aggregate() options
Add $match/$project stages early to reduce data volume
Use $bucketAuto or limit group cardinality for large datasets

title: MongoDB Atlas Search index not found
fixes: Create the Atlas Search index via Atlas UI or API
Verify index name in $search stage matches the created index
Wait for index to reach READY status before querying

title: MongoDB change stream resume token expired
fixes: Increase oplog size to retain events longer
Store resume tokens more frequently in your application
Handle InvalidResumeToken error by starting a fresh change stream

title: MongoDB time series metaField immutable after creation
fixes: metaField cannot be changed after collection creation - recreate collection
Plan time series collection schema carefully before creation
Use a new collection with correct metaField and migrate data

regex: Redis.*WRONGTYPE Operation against a key holding the wrong kind of value
title: Redis operation on wrong data type
fixes: Check key type with TYPE command before operating
Delete and recreate key if type needs to change
Use separate key namespaces for different data structures

title: Redis cluster is down
fixes: Check cluster health: redis-cli --cluster check <host>:<port>
Verify all master nodes have sufficient slots assigned
Fix failed nodes and run cluster fix to repair slot assignments

regex: Redis.*ERR Error running script.*CROSSSLOT Keys in request don't hash to the same slot
title: Redis cluster CROSSSLOT error
fixes: Use hash tags to force keys to same slot: {user:1}:profile, {user:1}:settings
Split multi-key operation into per-slot operations
Use EVAL with keys from the same hash slot only

regex: Redis.*LOADING Redis is loading the dataset in memory
title: Redis still loading dataset into memory
fixes: Wait for Redis to finish loading (check with INFO persistence)
Reduce dataset size or increase memory for faster load
Use lazy-freeing: lazyfree-lazy-server-del yes

regex: Redis.*OOM command not allowed when used memory > 'maxmemory'
title: Redis out of memory - maxmemory exceeded
fixes: Increase maxmemory in redis.conf
Set eviction policy: maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
Remove unused keys or reduce TTL on cached data

title: DynamoDB provisioned throughput exceeded (hot partition)
fixes: Enable auto-scaling or switch to on-demand capacity mode
Improve partition key design for better distribution
Use DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) for read-heavy hot keys

title: DynamoDB GSI doesn't project required attribute
fixes: Add the attribute to GSI projection: INCLUDE or ALL
Query the base table for non-projected attributes
Create new GSI with required projection (can't modify existing)

title: DynamoDB transaction cancelled due to condition failure
fixes: Check condition expressions match current item state
Implement retry with fresh read before conditional write
Use returned CancellationReasons to identify which item failed

title: PostgreSQL invalid jsonpath expression
fixes: Validate jsonpath syntax: use $ for root, .key for access, [*] for arrays
Escape special characters in jsonpath strings
Test with jsonb_path_exists() before using jsonb_path_query()

title: PostgreSQL ALTER TABLE blocked by pending triggers
fixes: Commit or rollback the pending transaction first
Disable triggers temporarily: ALTER TABLE ... DISABLE TRIGGER ALL
Run ALTER TABLE outside of transactions that modify the table

title: PostgreSQL logical replication requires wal_level=logical
fixes: Set wal_level = logical in postgresql.conf and restart
Verify with: SHOW wal_level
Note: changing wal_level requires server restart, not just reload

title: PostgreSQL partition constraint violated on UPDATE
fixes: Enable partition row movement: SET enable_partition_pruning = on
Use ALTER TABLE ... ENABLE ROW MOVEMENT for the partitioned table
Handle the move in application logic with DELETE + INSERT

regex: MySQL.*Error 1418.*This function has none of DETERMINISTIC.*NO SQL
title: MySQL function missing DETERMINISTIC or NO SQL attribute
fixes: Add DETERMINISTIC keyword if function always returns same output for same input
Add NO SQL or READS SQL DATA as appropriate
Set log_bin_trust_function_creators=1 globally (less secure)

title: MySQL GTID consistency violation with temp tables
fixes: Avoid CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE in transactions with GTID mode
Use CREATE TABLE with session-scoped naming instead
Set enforce_gtid_consistency=WARN to log without blocking

regex: MySQL.*Error 3098.*Table.*does not comply with the requirements.*primary key
title: MySQL table requires primary key (group replication)
fixes: Add a primary key to the table
Set sql_require_primary_key=OFF if not using group replication
Use a surrogate auto-increment key if no natural key exists

title: MongoDB $lookup from sharded collection limitation
fixes: $lookup target collection must be unsharded (or use $lookup with pipeline in 5.1+)
Denormalize data to avoid cross-shard lookups
Use client-side joins for sharded-to-sharded lookups

title: MongoDB $merge into sharded collection error
fixes: Ensure $merge uses 'on' field matching the shard key
Use whenMatched and whenNotMatched options explicitly
Consider $out to unsharded collection and manual redistribution

title: Redis cluster slot already being migrated
fixes: Complete or cancel the in-progress migration first
Use CLUSTER SETSLOT <slot> STABLE on both nodes to reset
Run redis-cli --cluster fix to resolve stuck migrations

title: Redis JSON module command not available
fixes: Load RedisJSON module: loadmodule /path/to/rejson.so
Upgrade to Redis Stack which includes JSON module
Check MODULE LIST to verify JSON module is loaded

title: Redis script not cached for EVALSHA
fixes: Use EVAL instead of EVALSHA for the first call
Catch NOSCRIPT error and fall back to EVAL with full script
Pre-load scripts on all nodes with SCRIPT LOAD after failover

title: DynamoDB item size limit exceeded (400KB)
fixes: Store large attributes in S3 and keep a reference in DynamoDB
Compress large attributes before storing
Split item into multiple items with a sort key scheme

title: DynamoDB expression attribute values unused
fixes: Remove unused :value placeholders from ExpressionAttributeValues
Verify all :value references are used in the expression
Match expression attribute names/values 1:1 with the expression

regex: DynamoDB.*ResourceNotFoundException.*Cannot do operations on a non-existent table
title: DynamoDB table not found
fixes: Verify table name and region match exactly
Wait for table creation to complete: ACTIVE status
Check IAM permissions include dynamodb:DescribeTable on the resource

title: PostgreSQL column does not exist
fixes: Check column name for typos and case sensitivity (use double quotes for mixed case)
Run migrations to add the missing column
Use \d+ tablename to verify available columns

title: PostgreSQL exclusion constraint index missing
fixes: Install btree_gist or btree_gin extension for non-default operator support
Create the required operator class index first
Use CREATE EXTENSION btree_gist before defining exclusion constraints

title: MySQL incorrect value for column type
fixes: Validate data types before insertion
Set sql_mode to remove STRICT_TRANS_TABLES for lenient handling
Convert values explicitly: CAST(val AS SIGNED), STR_TO_DATE(...)

title: MongoDB $unionWith cross-database limitation
fixes: All collections in $unionWith must be in the same database
Copy data to same database before aggregation
Use application-side union for cross-database queries

regex: Redis.*READONLY.*can't write against a read only replica
title: Redis write command sent to replica
fixes: Connect to the master node for write operations
Use Redis client library with master/replica awareness
Check sentinel/cluster failover status for current master

title: PostgreSQL publication not found for logical replication
fixes: Create publication: CREATE PUBLICATION pub_name FOR TABLE table1, table2
Use FOR ALL TABLES to replicate entire database
Verify publication exists: SELECT * FROM pg_publication

regex: PostgreSQL.*ERROR:.*could not extend file.*No space left on device
title: PostgreSQL disk space exhausted
fixes: Free disk space: remove old WAL, temp files, unused indexes
Add tablespace on a different volume
Run VACUUM FULL to reclaim dead tuple space (requires exclusive lock)

title: PostgreSQL connection limit exceeded for role
fixes: Increase CONNECTION LIMIT on the role: ALTER ROLE name CONNECTION LIMIT 200
Use connection pooling (PgBouncer) to reduce connection count
Close idle connections: SELECT pg_terminate_backend(pid) for idle sessions

title: PostgreSQL insufficient privileges for GRANT
fixes: Connect as the object owner or superuser to GRANT
Use ALTER ... OWNER TO to change ownership first
Grant WITH GRANT OPTION to allow delegation of privileges

regex: PostgreSQL.*FATAL:.*remaining connection slots are reserved for.*superuser
title: PostgreSQL all non-superuser connections used
fixes: Increase max_connections in postgresql.conf
Use connection pooling to reduce active connections
Connect as superuser to diagnose and terminate idle sessions

title: MySQL InnoDB lock wait timeout
fixes: Increase innodb_lock_wait_timeout for long transactions
Check SHOW ENGINE INNODB STATUS for lock details
Optimize transaction to hold locks for shorter duration

regex: MySQL.*Error 1071.*Specified key was too long.*max key length is 3072 bytes
title: MySQL index key too long
fixes: Use prefix index: CREATE INDEX idx ON table(col(191))
Reduce column size or use utf8mb3 instead of utf8mb4
Use innodb_large_prefix=ON with ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC

regex: MySQL.*Error 1118.*Row size too large.*The maximum row size.*8060
title: MySQL row size exceeds maximum
fixes: Use ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC or COMPRESSED for off-page storage
Convert large VARCHAR to TEXT (stored off-page)
Split table into multiple tables with 1:1 relationship

title: MySQL JSON partial update failed
fixes: Use JSON_SET, JSON_REPLACE, JSON_REMOVE for partial updates
Ensure the target path exists for JSON_REPLACE
Fall back to full column replacement if partial update fails

regex: MySQL.*Error 3719.*Definition of.*window.*is not allowed in this context
title: MySQL window function used in invalid context
fixes: Window functions can't be in WHERE/HAVING - use subquery or CTE
Move window function to outer query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT ..., ROW_NUMBER() OVER() as rn ...)
Use QUALIFY clause alternative with subquery

title: MongoDB stale chunk config during migration
fixes: Retry the operation - stale config is usually transient
Run sh.status() to check balancer and chunk distribution
Refresh routing table: db.adminCommand({flushRouterConfig: 1})

title: MongoDB incomplete transaction history in oplog
fixes: Increase oplog size: replSetResizeOplog
Reduce long-running transactions that span large oplog windows
Re-sync secondary nodes if oplog gap is too large

title: MongoDB operation exceeded maxTimeMS
fixes: Optimize the query with proper indexes
Increase maxTimeMS if the operation legitimately needs more time
Use aggregation pipeline optimization ($match early, $project to limit fields)

title: MongoDB Atlas Search field not in index definition
fixes: Update Atlas Search index to include the queried field
Use dynamic mapping to index all fields automatically
Add specific field mapping in the search index definition

title: MongoDB write conflict in WiredTiger
fixes: Retry the operation - WiredTiger retries internally but may surface this
Reduce write contention on the same document
Use multi-document transactions with retry logic

title: Redis Stream XADD MAXLEN invalid value
fixes: Use a positive integer for MAXLEN: XADD stream MAXLEN 1000 * field value
Use ~ for approximate trimming: MAXLEN ~ 1000
Omit MAXLEN if stream should grow unbounded

title: Redis Stream consumer group doesn't exist
fixes: Create consumer group first: XGROUP CREATE stream group_name $ MKSTREAM
Use 0 instead of $ for group start ID to read from beginning
Check stream exists before creating group on it

title: Redis invalid expire time
fixes: Ensure expire time is a positive integer (seconds for SETEX)
Use PSETEX for millisecond precision
Check value isn't 0 or negative - minimum is 1 second/millisecond

regex: Redis.*EXECABORT.*Transaction discarded because of previous errors
title: Redis transaction aborted due to error in MULTI block
fixes: Fix the command that caused the error within the MULTI block
Check all commands are valid before EXEC
Use WATCH for optimistic locking and retry on failure

title: DynamoDB invalid KeyConditionExpression operator
fixes: Sort key in KeyConditionExpression supports: =, <, >, <=, >=, BETWEEN, begins_with
Partition key only supports = operator in key conditions
Move complex conditions to FilterExpression (applied after read)

regex: DynamoDB.*ThrottlingException.*Rate of requests exceeds the allowed throughput
title: DynamoDB request throttling
fixes: Implement exponential backoff with jitter
Switch to on-demand capacity mode for unpredictable workloads
Spread requests across multiple partition key values

regex: DynamoDB.*ValidationException.*Transaction request cannot include multiple operations on one item
title: DynamoDB transaction multiple operations on same item
fixes: Combine multiple operations into a single Update expression
Split into separate transactions if operations must be distinct
Use condition expressions to enforce all checks in one operation

title: PostgreSQL GIN index pending list too large for fast scan
fixes: Run VACUUM on the table to flush pending GIN entries
Increase gin_pending_list_limit for the index
Use fastupdate=off on the GIN index for immediate updates (slower writes)

title: PostgreSQL cannot create trigger on individual partition
fixes: Create the trigger on the partitioned (parent) table instead
In PG 13+ triggers on parent propagate to partitions
Use event triggers for DDL-level events

title: PostgreSQL aggregate ORDER BY with DISTINCT conflict
fixes: Remove DISTINCT or ORDER BY from the aggregate
Use a subquery to pre-sort/deduplicate before aggregating
Use array_agg(DISTINCT x ORDER BY x) which is supported in PG 16

title: MySQL recursive CTE reference error in subquery
fixes: Reference the CTE name directly, not via subquery wrapping
Ensure recursive CTE is defined before being referenced
Move the subquery logic into the recursive CTE definition

title: MySQL foreign key prevents deletion
fixes: Delete child records first or use ON DELETE CASCADE
Temporarily: SET FOREIGN_KEY_CHECKS=0 (dangerous in production)
Use DELETE with JOIN to remove parent and children together

title: MongoDB $graphLookup max depth exceeded
fixes: Set maxDepth parameter to limit traversal depth
Add restrictSearchWithMatch to narrow the graph exploration
Restructure data model if graph queries are consistently deep

title: MongoDB write concern replication timeout
fixes: Increase wtimeout for write operations
Reduce write concern from majority to w:1 if appropriate
Check replica set member health and network latency

regex: Redis.*BUSY.*Redis is busy running a script
title: Redis busy with long-running script
fixes: Optimize the Lua script to run faster
Use SCRIPT KILL to terminate a read-only script
Use SHUTDOWN NOSAVE as last resort if script modifies data

title: Redis Bloom filter doesn't exist
fixes: Create Bloom filter first: BF.RESERVE key error_rate capacity
Use BF.ADD which auto-creates with default parameters
Load RedisBloom module if commands are not recognized

title: Redis Top-K structure not initialized
fixes: Initialize with TOPK.RESERVE key topk width depth decay
Load Redis probabilistic data structures module
Verify key is a Top-K type with TYPE command

title: DynamoDB Query missing partition key in condition
fixes: Always provide partition key equality condition in Query
Use Scan with FilterExpression if partition key is unknown
Ensure KeyConditionExpression includes the table/index partition key

title: DynamoDB Streams subscriber limit exceeded
fixes: Reduce number of simultaneous stream consumers
Share a single Kinesis Data Streams consumer across multiple processors
Use fan-out pattern with single reader distributing to workers

title: PostgreSQL RETURNING clause limitation in CTE
fixes: Move RETURNING to the main query, not the CTE
Use a separate query to fetch the affected rows
In PG 14+ data-modifying CTEs support RETURNING correctly

regex: PostgreSQL.*ERROR:.*operator class.*does not accept data type
title: PostgreSQL operator class incompatible with data type
fixes: Use correct operator class for the data type (btree vs gin vs gist)
Cast the column to a supported type before indexing
Install btree_gin or btree_gist extension for additional type support

title: MySQL value truncation error
fixes: Check data fits within column constraints (length, type)
Set SQL mode to allow truncation if acceptable: ALLOW_INVALID_DATES
Validate and clean data before insertion

title: MySQL cannot modify column used in generated column
fixes: Drop the generated column, modify the source column, then recreate generated column
Create new column and migrate data manually
Use a VIEW with computed column instead of generated column

title: MongoDB $regex options conflict
fixes: Use either inline regex options /pattern/i or $options, not both
Move options to $options field: {$regex: 'pattern', $options: 'i'}
Use Regex type directly for simple patterns

title: MongoDB aggregation exceeded document size limit
fixes: Reduce individual document sizes in pipeline output
$unwind before $group to avoid massive grouped documents
Use $limit and $skip for pagination of large result sets

title: Redis cluster MOVED redirect
fixes: Use a cluster-aware client that handles MOVED automatically
Update slot-to-node mapping: CLUSTER SLOTS or CLUSTER SHARDS
Client should reconnect to the correct node indicated in MOVED

title: Redis cluster ASK redirect during migration
fixes: Send ASKING command to target node before retrying the command
Use cluster-aware client that handles ASK automatically
Wait for slot migration to complete for stable routing

title: DynamoDB conditional check expression failed
fixes: Verify current item state matches condition expression
Implement optimistic locking pattern with version attribute
Use ReturnValuesOnConditionCheckFailure to see current values

title: DynamoDB number overflow (38 digits max)
fixes: DynamoDB numbers support up to 38 significant digits
Store very large numbers as strings if precision is needed
Use scientific notation for extremely large values

title: PostgreSQL pg_trgm extension not installed
fixes: Run CREATE EXTENSION pg_trgm
Ensure pg_trgm is in shared_preload_libraries for faster indexing
Use GIN or GiST index with pg_trgm: CREATE INDEX ... USING gin(col gin_trgm_ops)

title: MySQL recursive CTE max recursion depth
fixes: Set cte_max_recursion_depth = 10000 (or appropriate value)
Add recursion termination condition in WHERE clause
Use a counter in the CTE to limit depth explicitly

title: MongoDB $densify field type requirement
fixes: Ensure the field used in $densify is a date or numeric type
Convert field type before $densify stage: $addFields with $toDate
Use $fill as an alternative for gap-filling in time series

title: Redis Count-Min Sketch initialization error
fixes: Initialize with CMS.INITBYDIM key width depth
Or use CMS.INITBYPROB key error probability
Load RedisBloom module which provides CMS commands

title: DynamoDB expression attribute name invalid character
fixes: Use # prefix for attribute name placeholders: #name
Only alphanumeric and underscore allowed in placeholder names
Map reserved words: ExpressionAttributeNames: {'#status': 'status'}

title: PostgreSQL cannot VACUUM partitioned table directly
fixes: VACUUM individual partitions instead of the parent table
Use VACUUM with no table name to vacuum entire database
In PG 14+ VACUUM on partitioned table propagates to partitions

regex: RenderFlex overflowed by .* pixels on the (right|bottom|left|top)
title: Flutter RenderFlex overflow
fixes: Wrap overflowing widget in Expanded or Flexible
Use SingleChildScrollView for scrollable content
Add overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis for Text widgets

title: Flutter setState called after widget dispose
fixes: Check 'if (mounted)' before calling setState()
Cancel async operations in dispose() method
Use a flag or CancelableOperation to track widget lifecycle

regex: MissingPluginException.*No implementation found for method.*on channel
title: Flutter platform channel method not implemented
fixes: Ensure native plugin is registered in MainActivity/AppDelegate
Run 'flutter clean' and rebuild the app
Check plugin version compatibility with Flutter version

title: Flutter Riverpod/Provider not found in widget tree
fixes: Wrap the widget tree with ProviderScope at the top
Ensure ConsumerWidget or HookConsumerWidget is used correctly
Check that the provider is accessible from the widget's location in tree

title: Flutter GoRouter route not found
fixes: Check route path matches exactly (including leading slash)
Ensure the route is defined in GoRouter configuration
Use errorBuilder to handle unknown routes gracefully

title: Flutter build_runner output conflict
fixes: Run 'dart run build_runner clean' then 'dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs'
Check for duplicate generators targeting the same file
Ensure part/part of directives are correct in generated files

regex: A RenderFlex overflowed.*This error happens when.*Expanded.*Flexible
title: Flutter Flex layout constraint error
fixes: Use Expanded to fill available space in Row/Column
Set mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min on Row/Column
Wrap content in ConstrainedBox or SizedBox for explicit sizing

regex: LateInitializationError: Field '.*' has not been initialized
title: Flutter late field not initialized
fixes: Initialize the field before accessing it
Use nullable type with null check instead of late
Move initialization to initState() for widgets

regex: type 'Null' is not a subtype of type '.*' in type cast
title: Flutter null cast to non-nullable type
fixes: Use 'as Type?' for nullable casts then null check
Ensure the value is not null before casting
Use pattern matching: if (value case Type v) { ... }

title: Flutter PlatformException from native code
fixes: Check platform-specific error code and message for details
Verify native permissions are granted (camera, location, etc.)
Handle PlatformException with try/catch in the calling code

regex: StateError.*Cannot emit new states after calling close
title: Flutter Bloc/Cubit emit after close
fixes: Check isClosed before emitting new states
Cancel subscriptions and timers in close() method
Use StreamSubscription.cancel() in Bloc close()

title: Flutter Riverpod StateNotifier used after disposal
fixes: Check mounted property before state updates
Don't store references to notifiers outside provider scope
Use ref.onDispose() to clean up async operations

title: Flutter GoRouter infinite redirect loop
fixes: Add base case to redirect logic: return null to stop redirecting
Check redirect doesn't redirect to a path that also redirects
Use state.location to avoid redirecting to the current location

title: Flutter number parsing format exception
fixes: Use int.tryParse() or double.tryParse() which return null on failure
Validate string input before parsing
Trim whitespace from string before parsing: str.trim()

regex: Exception.*type '.*' is not a subtype of type '.*' of 'function result'
title: Flutter function return type mismatch
fixes: Check the function's return type annotation matches actual return
Ensure generic type parameters are correct
Use explicit casting or convert the value to expected type

title: React Native TurboModule not found
fixes: Ensure the native module is registered in the TurboModuleProvider
Run pod install (iOS) or gradle sync (Android) after adding module
Check the module spec name matches the native registration name

title: React Native Fabric component not registered
fixes: Register component in the ComponentDescriptorProvider for Fabric
Ensure native component uses the new Fabric renderer API
Check that codegen generated the necessary interface files

title: React Native module resolution failure
fixes: Clear Metro bundler cache: npx react-native start --reset-cache
Delete node_modules and run npm install/yarn again
Check package.json doesn't have conflicting versions of the module

title: React Native native component not linked
fixes: Run 'npx react-native link' or rebuild native project
For iOS: cd ios && pod install && rebuild
Verify the native component is exported in the correct module

title: React Native Hermes bytecode version mismatch
fixes: Clean build: cd android && ./gradlew clean
Delete build caches and Metro cache, rebuild from scratch
Ensure Hermes engine version matches React Native version

title: React Native bridge not available with New Architecture
fixes: Migrate module from bridge to TurboModules/Fabric API
Use interop layer: RCTTurboModule bridging for gradual migration
Check newArchEnabled flag in gradle.properties/Podfile

title: SwiftUI preview crash
fixes: Clean build folder: Cmd+Shift+K, then rebuild
Check for force-unwrapped optionals or fatalError in preview code

title: Swift Combine publisher cancelled unexpectedly

regex: Cannot access.*before supertype constructor has been called
title: Accessing member before super constructor completes
fixes: Move the initialization to an init block after super constructor
Use lazy initialization for the property
Pass the value as a constructor parameter instead

regex: Only the original thread that created a view hierarchy can touch its views
title: UI update from wrong thread on Android
fixes: Use runOnUiThread { } or view.post { } to update UI from background
Use withContext(Dispatchers.Main) in coroutines
Use LiveData/StateFlow which automatically dispatches to main thread

title: ViewModel missing no-arg constructor
fixes: Create a ViewModelFactory to provide constructor arguments
Use Hilt @HiltViewModel + @Inject constructor for DI
Use by viewModels { factory } delegate with custom factory

title: Unresolved reference in Kotlin
fixes: Import the missing class or function
Check that the dependency providing it is in build.gradle
Verify the Kotlin/Android SDK version supports this API

title: Nullable type where non-null expected
fixes: Use !! operator if you're certain it's non-null (risky)
Use safe call with let: value?.let { nonNull -> ... }
Provide a default with Elvis: value ?: throw IllegalStateException()

regex: Suspension functions can be called only within coroutine body
title: Suspend function called outside coroutine
fixes: Launch a coroutine: lifecycleScope.launch { suspendFun() }
Use viewModelScope.launch in ViewModel
Make the calling function also suspend

title: Fragment operation when not attached to Activity
fixes: Check isAdded before accessing context or activity
Use viewLifecycleOwner.lifecycleScope for Fragment coroutines
Cancel pending operations in onDestroyView

title: Kotlin compiler type incompatibility
fixes: Add explicit type conversion: .toInt(), .toString(), etc.
Check generic type parameters for variance issues
Verify function return type matches the expected type

title: Layout XML inflation error
fixes: Check for missing custom view class in the XML layout
Verify all required attributes are present in the XML
Ensure theme/style referenced in layout exists
Check that custom view has constructor with (Context, AttributeSet)

title: KAPT annotation processing failed
fixes: Check error above for the actual annotation processor failure
Clean and rebuild: ./gradlew clean assembleDebug
Update kapt dependencies to match library versions
Add kapt.incremental.apt=true to gradle.properties

title: Resource leak detected by StrictMode
fixes: Use .use { } block for Closeable resources (auto-closes)
Close cursors, streams, and connections in finally block
Use try-with-resources pattern: resource.use { ... }

title: Invalid notification configuration
fixes: Ensure notification channel is created before posting (Android 8+)
Set a valid small icon with setSmallIcon()
Check that PendingIntent has FLAG_IMMUTABLE or FLAG_MUTABLE

title: Background service start not allowed (Android 12+)
fixes: Use setForeground() for WorkManager expedited work
Use ForegroundService with foregroundServiceType declared in manifest
Schedule work with WorkManager instead of direct service start
Use exact alarms with SCHEDULE_EXACT_ALARM permission

title: OOM from bitmap allocation
fixes: Use image loading library (Coil/Glide) with automatic downsampling
Set inSampleSize in BitmapFactory.Options to load smaller images
Recycle bitmaps when no longer needed
Use hardware bitmaps where possible

title: Method called on nil object
fixes: Use safe navigation operator: object&.method
Add nil check: if object.present? or unless object.nil?
Use dig for nested hash access: hash.dig(:key1, :key2)

title: Undefined method on object
fixes: Check the object's class with .class — it may not be what you expect
Verify the method exists: object.respond_to?(:method_name)
Include the correct module or require the right gem

title: ActiveRecord record not found
fixes: Use find_by instead of find — it returns nil instead of raising
Add rescue ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound for graceful handling
Verify the ID exists before querying

title: ActiveRecord validation failure on save!
fixes: Use save instead of save! to get false instead of exception
Check model.errors.full_messages for specific validation failures
Fix the data to satisfy validations or adjust validation rules

title: Rails routing error - no matching route
fixes: Run rails routes to see all available routes
Add the missing route to config/routes.rb
Check HTTP verb — you may be using GET when POST is defined
Verify the route helper name matches: resource_path vs resources_path

title: Pending database migrations
fixes: Run rails db:migrate to apply pending migrations
Run rails db:migrate:status to check migration status
If in production, run RAILS_ENV=production rails db:migrate

title: Pending migration prevents app start
fixes: Run rails db:migrate
If migration is broken, fix the migration file or run rails db:rollback
In test env: rails db:test:prepare or rails db:schema:load

regex: Bundler could not find compatible versions for gem
title: Gem version conflict in Bundler
fixes: Run bundle update <gem_name> to resolve the specific gem
Check Gemfile for overly strict version pins
Use bundle viz or bundler-audit to visualize dependency tree
Try removing Gemfile.lock and running bundle install fresh

title: Required file or gem not found
fixes: Install the missing gem: gem install <name> or add to Gemfile
Check require statement spelling and path
Run bundle install if the gem is in Gemfile but not installed

title: Uninitialized constant reference
fixes: Check class/module naming matches file path (Rails autoloading)
Add require or require_relative for the file defining the constant
Verify the namespace: use ::ClassName for top-level constants

title: Wrong number of arguments passed to method
fixes: Check the method signature for required vs optional parameters
Use keyword arguments for clarity: def method(name:, age: nil)
Verify you're not passing a hash without ** splat operator

title: Database column does not exist
fixes: Create a migration to add the column: rails g migration AddColumnToTable
Run pending migrations: rails db:migrate
Check if you're referencing a renamed or removed column

title: Required parameter missing from request
fixes: Ensure the form/request sends the required param nested correctly
Check strong params: params.require(:model).permit(:field)
Verify parameter nesting matches what the controller expects

title: Gem version mismatch at runtime
fixes: Run bundle exec before the command to use Bundler's resolved versions
Update the conflicting gem: bundle update <gem>
Remove version lock from Gemfile if too restrictive

regex: ActiveRecord::RecordNotUnique.*duplicate key value violates unique constraint
title: Unique constraint violation in database
fixes: Add uniqueness validation to model: validates :field, uniqueness: true
Use find_or_create_by instead of create
Handle the exception with rescue ActiveRecord::RecordNotUnique
Add unique index in migration if not present

title: Implicit type conversion error
fixes: Explicitly convert: .to_s, .to_i, .to_f as needed
Use string interpolation which calls to_s automatically: "value: #{var}"
Check if the variable is nil when String was expected

title: Ruby syntax error
fixes: Check for missing end keyword matching if/def/do/class
Look for unclosed string literals or parentheses
Verify heredoc syntax and terminators

title: Database does not exist
fixes: Run rails db:create to create the database
Check database.yml for correct database name and credentials
Verify PostgreSQL/MySQL service is running

title: Port already in use
fixes: Kill the process using the port: lsof -i :3000 then kill PID
Use a different port: rails s -p 3001
Use spring stop if Spring is holding the port

title: Undefined variable in view template
fixes: Pass the variable from controller: @variable in action
Use local_assigns.key?(:var) for partials with optional locals
Check the render call passes required locals: render partial: 'x', locals: {var: val}

title: Undefined variable used
fixes: Initialize the variable before use
Check for typos in the variable name
Use isset() or null coalescing: $var ?? 'default'
Verify variable scope — variables inside functions aren't global

title: PHP class not found
fixes: Run composer dump-autoload to regenerate autoload files
Check namespace matches directory structure (PSR-4)
Verify use statement at top of file imports the class
Ensure the package is installed: composer require vendor/package

title: Database table does not exist
fixes: Run php artisan migrate to create the table
Check table name in migration matches what the model expects
Set protected $table = 'table_name' in model if non-standard name

title: Duplicate key constraint violation
fixes: Use firstOrCreate() or updateOrCreate() instead of create()
Add unique validation rule before saving
Handle exception: try/catch QueryException
Use INSERT ... ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE for bulk operations

regex: Undefined.*offset|Trying to access array offset on.*null
title: Array offset undefined or null access
fixes: Check array key exists: isset($arr['key']) or array_key_exists()
Use null coalescing: $arr['key'] ?? 'default'
Verify the data source returns expected array structure

title: Blade view template not found
fixes: Check the view path matches file location: resources/views/path/file.blade.php
Verify dot notation matches directory separators
Clear view cache: php artisan view:clear
Check file extension is .blade.php not just .php

title: CSRF token validation failed
fixes: Add @csrf directive inside your form
For AJAX: include X-CSRF-TOKEN header from meta tag
Check session driver is configured and working
Exclude the route in VerifyCsrfToken middleware if needed (API routes)

regex: Session store not set on request
title: Session not available in request
fixes: Ensure the route is within the 'web' middleware group
Check session driver configuration in .env and config/session.php
Verify storage/framework/sessions directory exists and is writable

title: Laravel container cannot resolve class
fixes: Check controller namespace in route file (Laravel 8+ requires full namespace)
Register the binding in a Service Provider
Run composer dump-autoload
Verify the class file exists at the expected path

title: PHP max execution time exceeded
fixes: Optimize the slow operation (add database indexes, reduce loops)
Increase max_execution_time in php.ini for legitimate long operations
Use queued jobs for heavy processing: dispatch(new ProcessJob)
Paginate data instead of processing all records at once

title: PHP memory limit exhausted
fixes: Use chunk() or cursor() for large Eloquent queries
Increase memory_limit in php.ini if the operation legitimately needs more
Free memory by unsetting large variables: unset($data)
Use lazy collections for processing large datasets

title: Call to undefined static method
fixes: Check the class actually has this static method
Verify you're not calling an instance method statically
Check if the method is in a trait that needs to be used

title: Database column not found
fixes: Create a migration to add the column: php artisan make:migration
Check for typos in column name
If using $fillable, ensure the column name matches the database
Run php artisan migrate if migration exists but hasn't run

regex: The (GET|POST|PUT|DELETE) method is not supported for (route|this route)
title: HTTP method not supported for route
fixes: Check your form method matches the route definition
Add @method('PUT') or @method('DELETE') for spoofed methods
Verify route file uses correct Route::get/post/put/delete

title: Accessing undefined property on class
fixes: Declare the property in the class definition
Check for typos in the property name
For Eloquent: verify the column exists or accessor is defined
Use property_exists() check before access

title: Class not found during dependency injection
fixes: Run composer dump-autoload to regenerate class map
Verify the class namespace and file path follow PSR-4
Check the service provider registers the binding correctly
Clear config cache: php artisan config:clear

title: File write permission denied
fixes: Fix permissions: chmod -R 775 storage bootstrap/cache
Set correct ownership: chown -R www-data:www-data storage
Check the directory exists and parent is writable
Verify SELinux/AppArmor isn't blocking writes

regex: Your requirements could not be resolved to an installable set of packages
title: Composer dependency resolution failed
fixes: Run composer update --with-all-dependencies to resolve together
Check for PHP version requirements in failed packages
Use composer why-not vendor/package version to diagnose
Try removing composer.lock and running composer install fresh

title: Database connection refused
fixes: Verify database service is running
Check .env DB_HOST, DB_PORT, DB_DATABASE, DB_USERNAME, DB_PASSWORD
For Docker: use container name as host, not localhost
Clear config cache: php artisan config:clear after .env changes

title: Required field validation failure
fixes: Ensure the form input name matches the validation rule key
Check that the field is included in the request (not empty/missing)
For file uploads: add enctype='multipart/form-data' to form
Use nullable rule if the field should be optional

title: N+1 query problem detected
fixes: Use eager loading: includes(:association) in Rails, with() in Laravel
Use JOIN to fetch related data in a single query
Use batch loading: IN clause with collected IDs
Add query monitoring gem/package to detect in development

title: Sequential scan in EXPLAIN plan (missing index)
fixes: Add an index on the filtered/joined column
Check if the table statistics are stale: ANALYZE table_name
Verify the WHERE clause isn't wrapping the column in a function
Consider a partial index if only a subset of rows match

title: Index exists but not being used
fixes: Check if a function wraps the indexed column (kills index usage)
Verify data types match — implicit casting prevents index use
Update table statistics: ANALYZE/UPDATE STATISTICS
Check if the optimizer estimates a full scan is cheaper (small table)
